channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump highlights Iran agreement as G7 summit concludes in France
item.description: President Trump defended the U.S.-Iran agreement during a press conference wrapping up the G7 summit in France.

item.title: WATCH: 'Devil Wears Prada' franchise surpasses $1 billion globally
item.description: The sequel earned $676 million worldwide, bringing the franchise's total box office past $1 billion nearly two decades after the original.

item.title: Edwards Air Force Base identifies eight victims killed in B-52 crash
item.description: The eight people killed in an Air Force B-52 Stratofortress crash this week have been identified.

item.title: Watch: Messi's standout performance and Kansas town supports Team Algeria
item.description: ABC News' Lara Spencer reports on the budding connection between a Kansas college town and a North African team.
